name: Insertion of Sensitive Information into Externally-Accessible File or Directory
description: The application stores sensitive information (e.g., credentials, personal data) in files or directories that are accessible to actors who should not have access. This enables unauthorized disclosure of confidential data.
detection_pattern: Sensitive data from INGRESS or STORAGE flows into a STORAGE[file] or STORAGE[directory] node that is linked to an EGRESS or EXTERNAL[public_access] node without AUTH or CONTROL restricting access. The sensitive data reaches an externally-accessible location without access control mediation.
